leadText: The Crown Pass (Japanese: カンムリパス Crown Pass) is a Key Item introduced in Generation VIII.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Crown Pass allows the player to access the Crown Tundra through Wedgehurst Station .

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text: Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Method Sw Sh CT Appears in the player's Bag upon purchasing the Expansion Pass and updating to at least Version 1.3.0

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A pass to go to the Crown Tundra. Show it to the rail staff at Wedgehurst Station.
